apps.name: AutoKuma
apps.description: Automates the creation of Monitors based on Docker container labels. Additionally provides a CLI for Uptime Kuma.

apps.name: GEA
apps.description: A docker app that monitors your domains for expiration. A JSON feed is exposed over HTTP which Uptime Kuma can monitor and alert on via the `HTTP(s) Json Query` feature.

apps.name: Home Assistant integration
apps.description: An integration for Home Assistant to view your monitors within Home Assistant. This allows you to utilise your Home Assistant ecosystem to create more complex monitors and automations that respond to your Uptime Kuma monitors.

apps.name: Kuma Mieru
apps.description: A 3rd-party Uptime Kuma monitoring dashboard built on Next.js, TypeScript and Recharts.

apps.name: Kuma Zabbix Bridge
apps.description: Bringing Zabbix Status to Kuma (Kuma to Zabbix Bridge)

apps.name: kuma-repoter
apps.description: A simple go reporter to send requests to Uptime Kuma's "Push" monitor

apps.name: kuma-sentinel
apps.description: Provides advanced push-based monitor types for even more insights and control.

apps.name: KumaAlert
apps.description: iOS Companion App that extends features of UptimeKuma, including Live Activities, notifications, widgets

apps.name: KumaBroadcast
apps.description: A simple python script to post incident and maintenance updates to Discord via webhooks

apps.name: KumaCompanion
apps.description: A Command Line Interface (CLI) for Uptime Kuma

apps.name: KumaCub
apps.description: Schedule and run local (Nagios-compatible) checks; push results to Uptime Kuma.

apps.name: KumaUptime (macOS)
apps.description: A native macOS menu bar app for monitoring Uptime Kuma servers. Supports private API mode, public status pages, notifications, and in-app monitor creation.

apps.name: MMM-AuthenticatedUptimeKuma
apps.description: A MagicMirror² module which allows you to display the status of your monitors on your mirror in different ways

apps.name: S3 Health
apps.description: Monitor buckets in Amazon S3, MinIO or other compatible services for storage usage, updated data etc., eg. checking for up-to-date backups

apps.name: Streamdeck Uptime Kuma
apps.description: An Uptime Kuma plugin for Elgato Streamdeck

apps.name: swatchdog
apps.description: A simple requester to send periodically requests to Uptime Kuma's "Push" monitor

apps.name: Uptime Kuma Manager
apps.description: An iOS app that allows you to connect to your Uptime Kuma servers and monitor the services directly from your phone.

apps.name: Uptime Kuma Notifier
apps.description: A macOS menu bar app that displays the status of your Uptime Kuma monitors and sends notifications when their status changes.

apps.name: Uptime Kuma Push Agent
apps.description: A lightweight monitoring agent with Go, Python, and shell implementations, designed to send network uptime data to Uptime Kuma's Push Monitor.

apps.name: Uptime Kuma Rest Api Library
apps.description: A TypeScript library and client for accessing Uptime Kuma REST API

apps.name: Uptime Mate
apps.description: An Uptime Kuma monitoring tool for Apple Watch.

apps.name: uptime-kuma-api (Python)
apps.description: A wrapper for the Uptime Kuma Socket.IO API

apps.name: UptimeKuma Agent
apps.description: A client that lets UptimeKuma monitor everything via Push—Bash commands, websites, Systemd status, and even Mi Home sensor statuses.

apps.name: uptimekuma-migrator
apps.description: Simple migrator from UptimeRobot to UptimeKuma

apps.name: UptimeKumaRemoteProbe
apps.description: A Remote Probe to work with Uptime Kuma "Push" monitor type.

apps.name: Wuma - Uptime Kuma iOs Manager
apps.description: An iOS app that allows you to monitor Uptime Kuma from your iPhone, iPad, and Apple Watch. Wuma adds iOS widgets and provides real-time notifications when services go down.

apps.name: xBarApp Uptime Kuma
apps.description: An Uptime Kuma plugin for xBarApp for Mac
